headline: Is Super Micro Computer a Buy, Sell or Hold at P/E Multiple of 13.53X?
summary: SMCI trades at 13.53X earnings, below industry valuation, riding AI server demand. But rising inventory, negative free cash flow and competition pose risks.

headline: Assessing Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Why Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Is On Investors’ Radar Today Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) is drawing fresh attention as investors weigh its recent share performance against current fundamentals, including revenue of US$35.7b and a reported net loss of US$234m.
